name: Video Frame Analyzer
description: Software that automates the quality control process for digitized video files and provides analysis for video frame level metadata.

name: BioReason
description: Incentivizing Multimodal Biological Reasoning within a DNA-LLM Model. Integrates DNA foundation models with LLMs for deep biological reasoning.

name: llm-context-optimizer (CodeSnippetBank)
description: Revolutionary Edge AI Development Platform with 1,029+ production-ready snippets. Focuses on 95% token reduction and biological code organization.
